title: [codex] Update dashboard announcements
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
## Summary
- Removes the pinned Pollen pricing announcement from the dashboard.
- Replaces the tiers announcement with a Quest launch banner that links to `#quests`.
- Adds a community models alpha banner with allowlist-only messaging and Discord contact.

## Validation
- `PATH=/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH npx biome check --write enter.pollinations.ai/frontend/src/components/news-faq/news-banner.tsx`
- `PATH=/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH npm run typecheck --workspace pollinations-enter`

gist.headline: New quests on the board
gist.blurb: The dashboard notice board got a refresh. We've swapped out the old pricing news for the Quests launch and a sneak peek at community models.
gist.summary: Updated the dashboard banners to remove the old pricing announcement, replacing it with a Quests launch banner linking to #quests and a new community models alpha allowlist notice.
gist.impact: Users logging into the dashboard will now see direct links to earn Pollen through Quests and instructions for joining the community models alpha via Discord.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a town crier or pinning up flyers on a community notice board. The flyers represent the new Quests and community models.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny newsboy cap, pinning colorful announcement flyers to a glowing digital notice board. One flyer shows a pixelated treasure map for Quests, another shows a tiny robot face. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi Stardew Valley aesthetic.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny newsboy cap, pinning colorful announcement flyers to a glowing digital notice board. One flyer shows a pixelated treasure map for Quests, another shows a tiny robot face. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi Stardew Valley aesthetic.
